old_claim.note: Animal Husbandry provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: Managed donkeys are the motive agents explicitly driven across the barley on the scoped threshing floor.

source_shape.source_locator: The Met translates the scene inscription as trampling the barley threshing floor and identifies donkeys being driven over it.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Handlers use managed donkeys as the active force that separates grain on the threshing floor.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Removing the animals would remove the defining operating mechanism of this specifically scoped treading practice.

ontology_before: Animal management was treated as one optional enabler of a broad collection of unrelated threshing methods.
ontology_after: The source-pinned node requires the donkeys that physically perform the documented trampling.
would_reject_if: The figures on the Raemkai threshing floor were reidentified as unmanaged wild animals or as unrelated to the trampling operation.
short_reason: Managed donkeys perform the scoped threshing operation.
